transcript.text:
[Cutting up fish at this hour?]
[Is it a late-night snack?]
[Earlier that day] What's a good bait?
Mackerel
Fish
You can go over there to catch some octopus
I can give you permission as the village chief to put a trap
[Permission Granted]
Just put it outside the fence
The octopus will come
[Heading to the spot with permission]
[Mackerel bait]
[Fully prepared]
[Attended with a villager for safety purposes]
[Trap #1]
Please let me eat it

[Trap #2]
[Trap #3]
[Traps 1, 2, & 3]
[The next morning]
The water was up here last night
It's all gone
I'm doomed
Let's see what we have
[No way she caught any]
[Empty]
What is this? The bait is gone
Why?
They ate it all
Wait this one is broken There's an exit here
I can already see the other one It's empty
It already looks empty

It's right here
Can you see it? It looks empty
What? What is that?
Right, I put a rock in there
There's a mud creeper
What is this~
1 mud creeper
Is this edible?
How did they take the bait?
That's too bad
[1 last spot]
[Attended with a villager for safety purposes]
[How about this time?]
Why's this so heavy?
What is that?
No way!

PD nim~ (Program Director)
I caught it
I hit it against the rock, I'm so sorry
It's holding onto the rock
What do I do?
[You mean to tell me I caught this?]
It's not big
[Tzu-sad]
I will go purchase 1 since this isn't enough
[Going for groceries]
[Arrived]
I'm finally here
[This is heaven]
Spicy rice cake ingredients..
[Artificial Flavoring]
Vienna sausage looks good

Like 3 packs of fishcake
I don't want to eat scallions, but it's needed
[Chips are a necessity as well]
[Purchased spicy rice cake ingredients and 1 octopus]
[Going back home]
Let's prepare the octopus first
Wait, let's make the fire first
I had the cauldron lid here
[First time starting a fire]
I'm scared It's hot
It's too windy
[Chat: Ouch, that hurts! I'm bleeding!]
It fell
[Fire starter]
[Chat: You need to put it under the wood] Oh under?
[Re-adjusting]

[It worked]
Let's put more of this
Hot, hot hot
Go inside!
[Shoving it in]
[Come on, fire]
It's all over
This hurts
[With the help of the viewers]
Just put it in? okay
[Chat: No, under]
Under?
[Reset]
Let's start all over again
[Actual reset]
I'm getting stressed out

I'll learn how to use the torch next time
[Angry Seoul-rat's solution]
[Chat: What are you doing? That's dangerous. Let's just order delivery]
[Chat: Are you playing Jenga?]
[Chat: Take out the cooking oil] Take it out? I saw it on the internet
[Chat: It won't work]
Okay fine
[Tzu-sad]
[Chat: Do it if you want to. Let her do what she wants] Okay let's try it
I'll put it in the middle
[Please work this time]
That's it, right?
[Chat: 30 points] 30 points?
Well, I didn't have a torch
[In goes the octopus]
I'll cook it just a little bit

My nose hurts because of the smoke
I look so tired
It's because that was difficult
[Saved from the spa]
[Cold water spa]
Should I make the Spicy Rice Cake inside the octopus broth?
I'll put the anchovy broth in
I'm too lazy to make one from the ingredients
2 cups of rice cake=1 spoonful of gochujang? (Chili pepper paste)
[20 cups expected..?] Then I'll put in 10 spoonfuls
I don't have that much experience with cooking
It got so windy all of a sudden
[Infinite Sugar] [Chat: Stop stop! That's too much!]
Why stop? I'm following the recipe
[Chat: Put more] More?
[Ignore the recipe]

[Chat: ??? Is this comedy?]
Someone told me to
[Soy sauce]
[Plum extract]
I have to grind up the garlic
Should I just put it in? I'm too lazy
[Chat: Recipe from hell]
It tastes good
[2kg of rice cake]
That's almost everything
This is a street vendor size
I can't finish it all
Oxygen absorbing gel packet
What do I need to put if it's too sweet? Soy sauce?
[Broth]
[Green onions]

[Black pepper]
I have a secret weapon
It's better than eating something that's not edible
That's not enough
It tastes good though
[Meanwhile she's away]
[Accident!]
[Chat: Spicy Light Stand! Legendary! Nice topping] Why doesn't it look too appetizing on screen?
What happened?
It fell
The light stand fell in?
Oh no~
PD~
Wow the visuals
Look at that
Compared to my fist

[Chat: Where's the octopus?] You guys want the octopus?
Only octopus
[Player Octopus has entered]
[The one she purchased]
It's too heavy I can't hold it up
It's finally complete
I'm exhausted
Bon appetit
Look at the sausage, it's huge right? I've been wanting to try it
I heard that everything tastes good on this lid
It's like my first time making spicy rice cake
But it's really tasty
Amazing
The sauce is really nice
Boiled egg
With the sauce

That's yummy
Ta-da
Spicy Octopus
It's good, but tough to chew
Tbh, it's very close to a regular spicy rice cake
But it's better because of this lid
Go away
[Chat: Is it raining there?] No, it's the fryer
[The one she caught]
[PD made her fried octopus] Thank you
Fried octopus
Nicely fried, right?
Bon appetit
[Do you want some? You want some sauce?]
[If you don't want it]
I wonder if this is cooked well

This is better than this one
It's okay
It will be tasty in pieces
Let's cut it up
It's almost like a shrimp tempura
Amazing
Really delicious
The tempura is nice Amazing
You're so good at this
Let's give this away It's not tasty
[Chat: Auntie, how much for 2 servings?]
Is that enough? Let me know if you want more
[Village announcement]
Okay, I will be safe
[Don't worry]
Gotta eat the head, but it's better without the skin

It's because the skin is tough to chew
It tastes better without the skin
[Chat: Do a chic-chic for me]
What is that?
Is it this?
Oh chic-chic like this?
I understand now
The head tastes good, but it's salty
It's nice and tender
I have a mosquito bite here
Of course there are a lot of mosquitos here I'm in the mountain
It's spicy
It's getting spicy
That's strange
Tbh,
The ones at the restaurants are better

It was good at first
But it's not good anymore
A healthy flavor
It has a very fake sweet flavor too
It's half fishcake, half rice cake
Who wants to try some?
All of this for 50 cents
Meat needs to go in every dish
That's moving from the wind
[Chat: It's a moving green screen]
I will show you
[Need to prove it every day] It's not a green screen
Thanks everyone~
[Next episode]
